title: Purely Velvety Turkish Pecan Su Boregi
description: A kid-friendly Turkish dish featuring pecan nuts, made in a tandoor clay pot, with a velvety texture and umami flavor, perfect for a snack or light meal, onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the chopped pecan nuts, crumbly feta cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Layer the phyllo dough in the tandoor clay pot, brushing each layer with melted butter.
Add the pecan and feta mixture to the phyllo dough layers.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs and warm milk.
Pour the egg and milk mixture over the pecan and feta layers.
Cover the tandoor clay pot with a lid and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the lid and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
